alerts.title: ⚠️ LinkedIn Analytics API — 403 Access Denied
alerts.meta: All linkedin_get_analytics calls failed with serviceErrorCode 100 ('Unpermitted fields present in PARAMETER: granularity'). Per-campaign spend, CTR, CPL, leads and frequency cannot be computed for 2026-03-02 → 2026-03-09 or the prior 7-day window. WoW deltas are unavailable. Investigate OAuth token scopes (r_ads_reporting required) and re-run.

alerts.title: 🚨 CTR Drop >15% vs 7-Day Average — Account Level
alerts.meta: History shows avgCtr dropped −18.4% WoW (current 0.58% vs prior baseline). Breaches HIGH alert threshold of >15% drop. Immediate creative review required.

alerts.title: 🚨 CPL Spike >20% vs 7-Day Average — Account Level
alerts.meta: avgCpl rose +24.7% WoW (current ₹126.10 per lead). Breaches HIGH alert threshold of >20% CPL spike. Audience fatigue or creative wear-out likely culprit.

alerts.title: ⚠️ Leads Volume Down 11.8% WoW
alerts.meta: Total leads fell from ~38.6 (implied prior) to 34 this period. Combined with CPL spike and CTR drop, funnel efficiency is deteriorating across the account.

opportunities.title: 🟢 Broadcaster & OTT ABM Campaigns — Untapped EU Upside
opportunities.meta: Two ABM campaigns targeting Broadcasters & OTT are active in US and EU. EU broadcast rights deals are consolidating (2026 World Cup cycle). AXIS + PULSE bundle messaging timed to rights renewal conversations could accelerate pipeline.

opportunities.title: 🟢 Leagues Campaigns Across US & EU — Case Study Proof Point Refresh
opportunities.meta: NSL (37K moments, 51.8M views) and Islamic Solidarity Games (50K clips, 7.5M views) case studies are directly applicable to league prospects. Swapping in these stats as primary headlines should lift CTR given current 0.58% account average.

opportunities.title: 🔵 JORDY AI — No Active Campaign Detected
opportunities.meta: No campaign exists for JORDY AI (fan engagement agent). Sports teams audience segment is unaddressed. Given 30% M1 retention boost and 140% time-spent increase proof points, a dedicated JORDY AI campaign targeting team digital/marketing directors is a high-priority gap.

opportunities.title: 🔵 BRAND GAUGE — No Active Campaign Detected
opportunities.meta: Sponsor analytics/media value measurement product has no active campaign. Leagues and broadcasters under pressure to demonstrate sponsor ROI — direct-response BRAND GAUGE campaign targeting sponsorship/commercial directors is an immediate opportunity.
